# crowci_organization (Data Source)

Get an organization by ID. The resource will still return an organization even if it does not exists, but it will return with id = 0

## Example Usage

```terraform
data "crowci_organization" "example" {
  id = 1
}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `id` (Number) The organization's ID.

### Read-Only

- `forge_id` (Number) Forge ID the organization belongs to.
- `is_user` (Boolean) Whether this organization represents a user account.
- `name` (String) Organization name.
